name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.8.2 metrics, value, technical-debt, and release-quality observability
added: Local metrics collector for product, quality, technical-debt, release, and value metrics
Feature/problem manifest with value and risk-reduction point scoring
Metric definitions for package change surface, release churn, net maturity, feature points, and technical debt
next_recommended: v3.8.3: generated release scorecards and previous-tag duration metrics
v3.9.0: guided conflict resolution assistant and safer merge workflow automation
v3.10.0: interactive rebase and commit cleanup workflows
v3.11.0: CI/CD and pull-request workflow integration
highlights: Makes release value, technical debt, release churn, package change surface, and net maturity measurable locally
Separates observable metrics from scored estimates
Supports better decisions between feature work and stabilization work
iteration_highlights: Extended quality checks with metrics collection
